product.name: Ari Gabardin 245
product.familyDescriptorPl: Tkaniny i dzianiny z włókna AriPam odporne na UV
product.familyDescriptorEn: UV-resistant AriPam fibre fabrics and knits
product.categorySourceGroup: AriPam spun fabrics for shoe lining
product.specLine: 245 g/m², 100% AriPam, Uv protective, 3/1 S Twill Woven Fabric
descriptions: It is used as a lining inside of the shoes.
Ari Gabardin 245 can also be used for outdoor jackets, safety jackets, pants and trousers.
245 g/m², 100% AriPam, Uv protective, 3/1 S Twill Woven Fabric
technicalParameters: Tensile Strength | Warp > 1800N ; Weft > 1200N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp > 35N ; Weft > 40N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Has 'hi-vis' property and EN ISO 20471 norm listed, but description does not explicitly frame this fabric as a certified hi-vis warning garment; primary stated use is shoe lining and outdoor/safety jackets without explicit fluorescent hi-vis application description.

modelOutput.noMatchReason: Product is explicitly described as a shoe lining fabric, also usable for outdoor jackets, safety jackets, pants and trousers. No explicit sector such as military, firefighting, energy, welding, motorcycle, medical, sport, architecture-building or transport is stated. Listed norms (EN 343, EN ISO 20471, EN 13758) and properties (hi-vis, UV protection) indicate general safety/outdoor performance but do not tie the product to a specific taxonomy application with direct evidence.
